specs.title: cp-000: Color stops editor
cp-001: Uses theme colors as quick picks
cp-002: Image
cp-003: URL input
cp-004: Preview thumbnail
cp-005: Image Position selector Cover Contain Top Center Bottom
cp-006: Overlay shared across all types
cp-007: Overlay type None Frosted Faded
cp-008: Intensity slider 0100 when overlay active
cp-009: Overlay color picker when overlay active
cp-010: Reset to Theme Default button
cp-011: Theme picker with preset themes
cp-012: Clicking a theme applies it globally to the deck
cp-013: Active theme is highlighted
cp-014: Institution Name text input
cp-015: Footer Text input
cp-016: Logo URL input
cp-017: Values persist across the deck
cp-018: Layout picker with visual layout options
cp-019: Changing layout updates the active slide immediately
cp-020: Active layout is highlighted
cp-021: Dropdown to select a master or No Master
cp-022: Applying a master also sets the slides layout
cp-023: Edit Masters button opens the Master Editor modal
cp-024: 5 transition options None Fade Slide Zoom Morph
cp-025: Morph tooltip Automatically animates matching elements between slides
cp-026: Active transition highlighted per slide
cp-027: Apply to All Slides button
cp-028: Note Slides without a transition use the global default
cp-029: AI Tools dropdown for active slide
cp-030: Operates on slides title subtitle content blocks speaker notes
cp-031: Apply callback updates the slide
cp-032: Coach panel with deck-wide analysis
cp-033: Uses audience type for context
cp-034: Navigate to Slide action from coach suggestions
